channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Lenovo has put an AI chip into a monitor that not only controls it, but can also give AI powers to your PC
item.description: Lenovo's AI Display is a screen with a discrete NPU inside that can transfer AI powers to your non-AI PC.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Everything you need to know about the Oscars’ AI controversy
item.description: Sometimes, authenticity can be a film’s most special effect. It took months for Best Actress front-runner Mikey Madison to learn how to pole dance like the titular exotic dancer in Anora and for her fellow nominee Timothée Chalamet to passably play guitar as Bob Dylan in A Complete Unknown.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: This mini PC rivals Apple's Mac Studio and Nvidia's DIGITS desktop supercomputer but will cost only a fraction of the price
item.description: Framework Desktop is a customizable mini PC powered by AMD Ryzen AI Max processors and up to 128GB RAM.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: DJI launches a vehicle-mounted drone dock station that seemingly comes straight from a sci-fi movie
item.description: DJI Dock 3 enables autonomous drone operations with long flight time, advanced imaging, and real-time data security features.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Everything new on Paramount Plus in March 2025
item.description: From Tarantino to Lynch, Paramount Plus is bringing some of the best Hollywood movies to the platform in March 2025.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: The latest Google Pixel 9a leak may have revealed all the official wallpapers
item.description: The wallpapers for the Pixel 9a have apparently leaked, and seem to confirm four colors for the handset.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: De'Longhi's new bean-to-cup coffee machine could make you a milk-frothing maestro
item.description: Love a latte but struggle to make them at home? The De'Longhi La Specialista Touch might be the solution.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How to watch Brit Awards 2025 online from anywhere and for free
item.description: With Jack Whitehall hosting and Sabrina Carpenter, The Last Dinner Party and Sam Fender performing, here’s how you can watch Brit Awards 2025 from anywhere.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: TrapC proposal to fix C/C++ memory safety
item.description: TrapC, a fork of the C language, is being developed as a potential solution for memory safety issues that have hindered the C and C++ languages. TrapC is a proposed C-language extension compiler intended to be implemented as a cybersecurity compiler for C and C++ code, said developer Robin Rowe.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: This is probably the best Windows alternative to the M4 Mac Mini: AMD-powered mini PC can drive four 8K monitors and has two 2.5Gb Ethernet connectors
item.description: The AuBox 8745 mini PC from Chuwi could rival the Apple M4 Mac Mini - but how does it shape up in terms of performance?
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: NASA’s SPHEREx Space Telescope will create the world’s most complete sky survey
item.description: The sky is about to get a lot clearer. NASA’s latest infrared space telescope, SPHEREx—short for Spectro-Photometer for the History of the Universe, Epoch of Reionization, and Ices Explorer—will assemble the world’s most complete sky survey to better explain how the universe evolved.
item.dc:creator: Susan Karlin, Fast Company

item.title: Washington Post loses 75K subscribers after Bezos-ordered op-ed pivot
item.description: The Washington Post has reportedly lost tens of thousands of subscribers in an apparent reaction to a decision by the outlet's billionaire owner to change the editorial focus of its opinion pages.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011 and which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: Lawrence Livermore’s Brian Spears, Judy Hill on achieving unprecedented AI advancements
item.description: Powerful computing platforms let Lawrence Livermore evolve artificial intelligence to ultimately benefit government and Americans, lab’s top AI researchers say.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is officially retiring Skype, the platform once popular for making calls and messaging, and redirecting users to Teams, the tech giant announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Singapore Authorities Charge Three Men Over Alleged Nvidia Chip Fraud Scheme
item.description: Singapore authorities have charged three men for their alleged involvement in a fraud scheme to procure Nvidia's high-end AI chips, sparking concerns over the illicit trade and US export restrictions.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to restore a deleted text message on iPhone
item.description: Accidentally deleting a text message on your iPhone or iPad is not a problem if you still need the message. Apple has a built-in way to recover it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple, Samsung strike deal for purchase of San Jose office building
item.description: Samsung has bought from Apple a big office building in San Jose, a deal that would enable the tech and consumer electronics titan to widen its Silicon Valley footprint.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: AI priorities: IT leaders emphasize productivity over innovation
item.description: IT leaders are still aiming for the low-hanging fruit when using AI, zeroing in on improving employee productivity rather than more advanced uses such as enabling innovation or expanding revenue, according to a new survey.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The rising threat of shadow AI
item.description: Employees in a large financial organization began developing AI tools to automate time-consuming tasks such as weekly report generation. They didn’t think about what could go wrong. Within a few months, unauthorized applications skyrocketed from just a couple to 65.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Stripe hits $91.5 billion valuation in latest tender offer
item.description: Stripe on Thursday announced a tender offer for employees and shareholders that valued the company at $91.5 billion, nearly 41% higher than its valuation a year ago, potentially delaying the fintech firm’s ambitions of going public.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: California Democrat Introduces Bill Targeting Trump's Meme Coin
item.description: California Democrat Rep. Sam Liccardo introduces a bill targeting President Donald Trump's meme coin, citing concerns over transparency, insider trading, and improper foreign influence.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Android phones to drive mobile sales in 2025
item.description: Global sales of smartphones will increase by 2.3% in 2025 compared to last year, according to a new report from IDC. Android-based phones are expected to account for most of the increase, including in China, where sales are expected to rise by 5.6% year over year.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Meta apologizes for 'error' that resulted in violent content flooding Instagram feeds
item.description: Meta, the parent company of Facebook and Instagram, apologized Thursday for a technical error that resulted in some users' Reels feeds being filled with graphic or violent content.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft calls on Trump to loosen AI chip export restrictions
item.description: Microsoft is calling on the Trump administration to loosen Biden-era restrictions on artificial intelligence (AI) chip exports that it argues could undermine U.S. leadership on the technology.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Vietnam plans energy shift toward building more solar, less reliance on gas and coal
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam is revising its energy plans to focus more on large solar farms and less on reliance on coal and natural gas. The fast-growing economy now aims to get 16% of its energy from the sun — more than triple its earlier target of just 5%.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips, which power artificial intelligence systems, continued to grow, sending the company's stock higher after hours. For the three months that ended Jan.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man who said he was upset with Musk and Trump charged with threatening to burn down xAI facility
item.description: ASHLAND CITY, Tenn. (AP) — A Tennessee man has been charged with an act of terrorism after he threatened to burn down an xAI facility because he was upset with its founder, Elon Musk, and President Donald Trump, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 8 ways to make Windows 11 work like Windows 10
item.description: Switching to Windows 11? You’re not alone. With the clock ticking down to Windows 10’s end-of-support date in October, professionals around the globe are making plans — and lots of them are making the upgrade to Windows 11.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Review: Gemini Code Assist is good at coding
item.description: Given that Microsoft/GitHub/Azure and Amazon/AWS offer AI coding assistants, namely GitHub Copilot and Amazon Q Developer, which work as add-ins to Visual Studio Code and other IDEs, it was inevitable that Google/GCP would introduce one of its own.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Top Apple exec concedes he had doubts about app store fees imposed on alternative payment options
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Longtime Apple executive Phil Schiller on Monday conceded he initially opposed fees that the iPhone maker charges for in app-transactions processed outside its own payment system because he feared violating a court-ordered mandate designed to create more competition.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Elizabeth Holmes fails to overturn her Theranos fraud conviction
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Elizabeth Holmes, the disgraced founder of Theranos, will remain in prison after losing a bid Monday to overturn her fraud conviction, with a federal appeals court saying she hadn’t proved there were legal missteps during her trial for defrauding investors with false claims of w
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
